info.title: MeadTools API
info.description: OpenAPI documentation for MeadTools public, authenticated user, and device integration endpoints.

BearerAuth.description: Send the access token in the Authorization header as `Bearer <token>`. External API clients should use MeadTools access tokens returned by the auth endpoints.

enum: A user by that email already exists
If that email exists, a reset link has been sent.
Device already attached to another brew
Missing device_id, start_date, or end_date parameters
You are not authorized to view this recipe
An error occurred while fetching the recipe
You are not authorized to update this recipe
You are not authorized to delete this recipe
Recipe does not have valid dataV2.
Failed to calculate recipe derived state
An error occurred while fetching the recipe
Name and recipe data are required.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's account details and saved recipes.

patch.description: Updates fields on the authenticated user's account. Passwords are hashed before storage.
Sets or updates the authenticated user's public username.

get.description: Returns additives ordered by name. Pass a name query to fetch exact case-insensitive matches.

post.description: Admin-only. Creates a catalog additive used by recipe-building tools.

get.description: Returns a single additive by UUID.

patch.description: Admin-only. Updates a catalog additive by UUID.

delete.description: Admin-only. Deletes a catalog additive by UUID.

get.description: Admin-only. Returns a paginated list of all recipes, including private recipes.

post.description: Creates a recipe for the authenticated user. New clients should send dataV2.

get.description: Admin-only. Returns all MeadTools user accounts.
Admin-only. Returns an active MeadTools user by numeric ID.

patch.description: Admin-only. Updates account fields for a MeadTools user. Set updateToken to generate a new hydrometer token.

delete.description: Admin-only. Soft-deletes a MeadTools user by setting active to false.

post.description: Authenticates a user with email and password and returns access and refresh tokens.
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token.
Creates a user account and returns access and refresh tokens.
Sends a password reset email when the address belongs to an account. The response does not reveal whether the user exists.
Updates a user's password using a valid password-reset token.

get.description: Returns the BJCP ingredient catalog used by recipe-building tools.

post.description: Admin-only. Creates a BJCP ingredient catalog entry.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's brew list with recipe names and latest tracking summary fields.

post.description: Starts a new brew from one of the authenticated user's recipes and snapshots the current recipe data.

get.description: Returns a single authenticated-user brew with entries grouped by stage.

patch.description: Updates brew metadata. Setting stage to COMPLETE automatically sets end_date when one is not provided.

delete.description: Deletes a brew owned by the authenticated user, detaches its devices, and deletes logs associated with the brew.

post.description: Assigns existing hydrometer logs from one of the authenticated user's devices to this brew.
Attaches one of the authenticated user's hydrometer devices to a brew.
Adds a timeline entry to a brew. STAGE_CHANGE entries are handled by updating the brew stage and return the refreshed brew.

patch.description: Updates a timeline entry for a brew. Stage change entries only allow datetime and note edits.

delete.description: Deletes a timeline entry for a brew. Stage change entries cannot be deleted through this endpoint.

post.description: Sends a contact form message to the MeadTools support inbox.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's hydrometer token and registered devices.
Returns brews owned by the authenticated user for hydrometer management screens.

post.description: Creates a brew and attaches the given hydrometer device to it.

patch.description: Renames a hydrometer brew when brew_name is provided, otherwise ends the brew and detaches the device.

get.description: Returns logs for a device between start_date and end_date. This endpoint currently uses device_id query lookup and does not require bearer auth.

post.description: Generates and stores a new hydrometer ingest token for the authenticated user.

patch.summary: Link recipe or alert settings to hydrometer brew
patch.description: Links one of the authenticated user's recipes to a hydrometer brew, or updates email-alert preference when recipe_id is omitted.

delete.description: Deletes a hydrometer brew owned by the authenticated user and removes its associated logs.

patch.description: Updates calibration coefficients for one of the authenticated user's hydrometer devices.

delete.description: Deletes a hydrometer device and removes or detaches its associated logs.

get.description: Returns logs for a brew owned by the authenticated user. The id path parameter is the brew id.

patch.description: Updates numeric log fields for a hydrometer log. device_id is required as a query parameter.

delete.description: Deletes a hydrometer log by id. device_id is required as a query parameter.
Deletes logs for a device within a date range for the authenticated user.

post.description: Intended for iSpindel devices to post readings to MeadTools. Registers or finds a device by name and writes a hydrometer log using the user's hydrometer token.
Intended for RAPT Pill devices to post readings to MeadTools. Registers or finds a device by name and writes a hydrometer log using the user's hydrometer token.
Intended for Tilt devices or Tilt integrations to post readings to MeadTools. Writes a hydrometer log using the user's hydrometer token. Accepts JSON or application/x-www-form-urlencoded bodies.
Intended for RAPT Pill cloud integrations to post readings to MeadTools. Writes a hydrometer log using the user's hydrometer token. Celsius temperatures are converted to Fahrenheit before storage.
Intended for RAPT Pill devices or integrations to register with MeadTools. Registers or finds a device by name and returns the device record.

get.description: Returns all ingredients, or filters by exact case-insensitive category or name.

post.description: Admin-only. Creates a sugar/fruit/other ingredient used by recipe-building tools.

get.description: Returns a single ingredient by numeric ID, or null when no ingredient matches.

patch.description: Admin-only. Updates an ingredient by numeric ID.

delete.description: Admin-only. Deletes an ingredient by numeric ID.

patch.description: Updates one of the authenticated user's own recipe comments.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a recipe comment. Users can delete their own comments; admins can delete any comment.

get.description: Returns a public recipe by ID. Private recipes require the owner or an admin bearer token.

patch.description: Updates an owned recipe. Admin users may also update recipes they do not own.

delete.description: Deletes an owned recipe. Admin users may also delete recipes they do not own.

post.description: Calculates the same derived recipe state used by the recipe builder from a v2 recipe data payload.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of public recipes, optionally filtered by recipe name or owner username.

post.description: Adds a comment or reply to a recipe as the authenticated user.
Creates or updates the authenticated user's rating for a recipe and returns aggregate rating data.

get.summary: Get recipe derived state by ID
get.description: Returns v2 recipe data plus the same derived recipe state used by the recipe builder. Public recipes are accessible to everyone; private recipes require the owner or an admin bearer token.
Returns paginated top-level comments for a recipe, including reply counts and public author display info.
Returns paginated replies for a recipe comment, including public author display info.
Returns all yeasts by default. Use brand for matching yeasts, or name/id for a single yeast.

post.description: Admin-only. Creates a yeast catalog entry.

get.description: Returns a single yeast by numeric ID, or null when no yeast matches.

patch.description: Admin-only. Updates a yeast catalog entry by numeric ID.

delete.description: Admin-only. Deletes a yeast catalog entry by numeric ID.
